summary: Commission system feature testing complete. All backend APIs and frontend commission card display working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard route is /food/dashboard, not /food-store-dashboard. Inconsistent route naming.

critical_code_review_comments: Commission system implementation is complete and working correctly
API /api/food/my-store/commission returns correct commission rates based on store type
Commission calculation in complete_delivery_and_pay_driver correctly computes platform_commission and seller_earning
Commission card displays correctly in FoodStoreDashboard overview tab
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing test seller with food stores
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission system tested. Key findings: 1) Backend commission API at /api/food/my-store/commission returns correct rates (fast_food=20%, market=15%, vegetables=12%, sweets=18%). 2) Commission card displays in /food/dashboard (not /food-store-dashboard). 3) All 11 backend tests pass. 4) Commission calculation deducts from seller earnings on order delivery.

features_tested.commission_calculation: complete_delivery_and_pay_driver saves platform_commission and seller_earning - WORKING
